calendar.matters:
Report Of Sale And Peition For Order Confirming
Off Calendar Sep-19-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Karen Mitchell appearing for and with successor trustee, Debra Dolch. Bid is increased to $1,089,100.00. Additional Bond in the amount of $1,089,100.00 is required. Counsel to submit the order with bond. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Teena Paxton, CSR #1558. Clerk: Ella Yip.

At 9:30am, Counsel returned to court and reported to the Court that the Buyer is a broker. He is not entitled to receive any commission. He has refused to waive the commission. Counsel wants to void the sale and start the bidding again. Court agrees to void the earlier bid. The buyer states that he is willing to waive the commission with the earlier bid. The bid is $1,089,100.00 with 3% commission to the selling brokers.
